meta.name: Global ReSet®
meta.heroTitle: Resettable Manual Call Point for International Mounting Standards
meta.heroDescription:
UL Listed resettable manual call point simulating break-glass activation without glass replacement. Key-operated reset mechanism. DPDT contacts (2 Form C) with visible activation indicator.

Universal mounting plate compatible with US, European (GLR models), single and double gang back boxes.

Intended for fire alarm systems requiring rapid reset and compatibility with regional installation standards.

Mounting note: GLR models are supplied for flush installation only. Surface back boxes are available separately.
